text.text:
-i went here as a new patient for a basic dental cleaning
-my hygienists were ms. saba and ms. penelope and dr. park for my exam
-the questions i was asked were those that were very specific and targeted to MY NEEDS and that really matters. i was NOT given generic informatio bu instead at the end, given a treatment/maintainence plan that would allow me to keep the best oral health possible based on my needs at this time
-again, many areas of need were addressed with excellent inquiry on each matter such as gum health, bone erosion,genetic history, current diet, and replacement of old fillings. i have never experienced such a detailed inquiry bank at any healthcare facility, dental or medical.
-absolutely superb PROFESSIONAL quality of service. the staff here works as if we are all on a college floor and being graded on every patient - they really take service very seriously AND apply actual academics from their past training

text.text:
My 10-year-old daughter had an appointment with Dr. Yazdi. She came highly recommended by several people, and the reviews for Expert Dental were outstanding, so I brought my daughter here for a complicated cavity that might require a root canal.

From the very beginning, the front desk—especially Penelope—was incredibly helpful. They were patient with scheduling since I live far away, and they walked me through all my options while I’m in the middle of switching insurance. I’m so grateful for the time they took to help me. Every single person who answered my many phone calls was kind, courteous, and informative.

Dr. Yazdi was sweet and patient with my daughter. She explained everything in the treatment plan so clearly that I barely had any questions left to ask. I felt very reassured by her calm and thorough approach.

The billing department also took the time to explain every detail of the treatment costs with both my current insurance and my upcoming insurance for next year. The entire office runs smoothly, is very clean, and every staff member we interacted with was friendly.

From start to finish, the experience was excellent. I have full confidence in their ability to take care of my girl, and I’m grateful we found this practice.

text.text: Dr. Ma at Expert Dental was fantastic. I needed a crown and was able to get a same-day crown done, which was incredibly convenient. The entire process was smooth and efficient, and I didn’t have to come back for multiple appointments. Dr. Ma explained everything clearly and made sure I was comfortable the whole time. The crown fits perfectly and looks great. I really appreciated how easy and stress-free the experience was. Highly recommend Dr. Ma and Expert Dental!

text.text: I had a wonderful experience with my first dental treatment here. Dr. Wu is the best, he has a very calming demeanor that put me at ease and the outcome of my treatment was excellent—the best I could have hoped for. Jasmine was also superb and kind! They were able to get me back in the same day that I had my tooth prepped to put the crown on. I was amazed !

text.text: Expert Dental exceeded my expectations in every way. From the moment I walked in, the staff welcomed me warmly and made the whole experience stress-free. The clinic is spotless, organized, and uses modern equipment, which gave me a lot of confidence. The dentist took the time to explain my treatment options, answered all my questions, and was extremely gentle during the procedure. I felt genuinely cared for, not rushed. My results look fantastic, and I’m very thankful for their professionalism and attention to detail. I highly recommend Expert Dental to anyone looking for high-quality, honest, and comfortable dental care.
